notes: Exact error string emitted via bail! in run() when all provided search paths are invalid or empty. Trap: it is in main.rs, not in cli.rs where paths are parsed.

query: is not a valid size constraint
notes: Exact fragment of the error string returned by SizeFilter::from_string() when the --size argument fails to parse. Lives entirely in the size filter module.
Enum defined in filter/size.rs, re-exported through filter/mod.rs, stored in Config, and parsed from CLI in cli.rs. Multi-file tracing required.
Enum defined in walk.rs for communicating between parallel walker threads and the receiver. Also consumed in exec/job.rs for the --exec batch path.
Struct defined in exec/mod.rs representing the parsed --exec / --exec-batch commands. Stored in Config, built from CLI in cli.rs, executed via exec/job.rs, and wired together in main.rs.

query: where are search results printed and colorized
notes: Conceptual query for the output layer. print_entry and its colorized/uncolorized variants live in output.rs; Config holds ls_colors and format options.

query: where is file type filtering implemented
notes: Conceptual query for the file-type filter (--type). FileTypes struct and should_ignore live in filetypes.rs; filter/mod.rs re-exports complementary filters; Config stores the combined filter state.

query: where is the parallel directory walk orchestrated
notes: Conceptual query for the walk engine. The WalkBuilder parallel dispatch loop, receiver thread, and BatchSender live in walk.rs; main.rs calls into it.

query: where is time-based filtering implemented for --newer and --older
notes: Conceptual query for time-based filters. TimeFilter enum and applies_to logic live in filter/time.rs; Config stores the Vec<TimeFilter>.
Impact check for editing the Config struct. Walk.rs takes Arc<Config> and reads many fields; output.rs receives &Config in print_entry; main.rs constructs Config via construct_config.
Impact check for editing DirEntry. walk.rs constructs DirEntry instances; output.rs receives &DirEntry in print_entry; filetypes.rs calls entry.file_type() in should_ignore.

FormatTemplate and the Token enum live in fmt/mod.rs. output.rs calls fmt.generate() for custom --format output; exec/mod.rs uses FormatTemplate inside CommandTemplate for --exec placeholder expansion; config.rs stores Option<FormatTemplate>.
Unix-only owner filter for --owner. Defined in filter/owner.rs (with its nix uid/gid checks), re-exported from filter/mod.rs, stored in Config behind #[cfg(unix)], and parsed from --owner in cli.rs.

query: how does fd go from CLI arguments to walking the filesystem and printing results
notes: Cross-file workflow query. main.rs drives the flow: Opts::parse() in cli.rs → construct_config → walk::scan which dispatches parallel workers → output::print_entry per result.
